data.title: Visa sees AI investments, consumer adjustments supporting economic outlook
data.description: Even if AI spending does not immediately result in productivity gains, Visa analysts still expect that improved processes over time will help the global economy.

data.title: Klaviyo launches beta for marketing AI agents
data.description: Klaviyo said it built the agents into its customer relationship management (CRM) platform, allowing them to work from the same real-time customer data across marketing and service.

data.title: Co-founder shares how Cotopaxi weighed pros and cons of omnichannel adoption
data.description: Over the years, Cotopaxi began to look at pilot and test various omnichannel offerings before ultimately deciding not to fully invest in the required technological and operational changes.

data.title: Motorcar Parts of America acquires Centric Parts brake brands
data.description: First Brands Group had entered Chapter 11 bankruptcy. In the announcement, Motorcar Parts of America said a court-supervised sales process managed the transaction.

data.title: QXO, TopBuild shareholders vote to approve acquisition
data.description: The votes pave the way for QXO's TopBuild merger to close as soon as July 1, now that shareholders have weighed in on the $17 billion deal.
